name: chromium-mcp
description: Launch and control Chromium on your local machine.

tools.name: launch_chromium
tools.description: Launch Chromium or Google Chrome, optionally opening a URL.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Open a URL in Chromium (launches the browser if not running).

tools.name: detect_chromium
tools.description: Detect whether Chromium or Chrome is installed and return the binary path.
